meta.name: Vanaja
meta.title: Certified Professional Coder
meta.tagline: Precision in Every Code, Excellence in Every Claim

hero.headline: Translating Clinical Bravery Into Actionable Data.
hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between front-line patient care and backend revenue optimization through precise, compliant, and data-driven medical coding.

bio: I'm a Certified Professional Coder (CPC) with over 8 years of experience in medical coding and billing across multi-specialty physician practices, outpatient facilities, and hospital systems.

My expertise spans diagnostic and procedural coding, chart auditing, denial management, and revenue cycle optimization. I'm passionate about translating complex clinical documentation into accurate codes that ensure compliance and maximize reimbursement.

I hold certifications from AAPC including CPC and CPMA, and I stay current with annual coding updates, CMS guidelines, and payer-specific requirements. I believe in continuous learning and contributing to the healthcare community through mentorship and knowledge sharing.

projects.title: Multi-Specialty Coding Audit Program
projects.description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive coding audit program for a 45-provider multi-specialty group, resulting in a 23% reduction in claim denials and $1.2M in recovered revenue over 12 months.

projects.title: E/M Documentation Improvement Initiative
projects.description: Led a provider education initiative on 2021 E/M guidelines, training 30+ physicians and APPs. Achieved 97% documentation compliance rate within 6 months.

projects.title: Denial Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built an Excel-based analytics dashboard tracking denial trends by payer, provider, and code. Identified top denial reasons and reduced overall denial rate from 12% to 4.8%.

projects.title: HCC Risk Adjustment Accuracy Program
projects.description: Implemented a retrospective and prospective HCC coding review program for a Medicare Advantage plan, improving RAF score accuracy by 18% and ensuring CMS compliance.

projects.title: Surgical Coding Optimization
projects.description: Reviewed and optimized surgical coding workflows for an orthopedic surgery center, correcting modifier usage and unbundling errors that increased clean claim rates to 96%.

projects.title: Telehealth Coding Compliance Guide
projects.description: Authored a comprehensive telehealth coding and billing compliance guide covering place of service codes, modifier usage, and payer-specific requirements during and post-pandemic.

achievements: Lead coding audits across 5 specialty departments with 98.5% accuracy rate
Reduced claim denial rate by 23% through targeted education and process improvement
Mentor team of 6 junior coders on complex surgical and E/M coding
Developed standardized coding audit templates adopted organization-wide
Coded 80+ charts daily across Emergency, Radiology, and Laboratory departments
Maintained 97% coding accuracy with <2% denial rate on coded claims
Implemented new charge capture workflow reducing coding lag by 40%
Trained 12 new coders during EMR transition to Epic
Provided remote coding services for 8 physician practices across 4 specialties
Conducted quarterly compliance audits with detailed reporting and recommendations
Specialized in cardiology and orthopedic surgical coding
Achieved 99.1% clean claim rate for primary assigned accounts

testimonials.quote: Sarah's coding accuracy is exceptional. Her audit program identified over $1.2M in recoverable revenue that we had been leaving on the table. She's not just a coder — she's a strategic asset to our revenue cycle.
testimonials.name: Dr. James Chen
testimonials.title: Chief Medical Officer

testimonials.quote: Working with Sarah transformed our denial management process. Her analytical approach to identifying root causes and her ability to educate providers made a measurable impact on our bottom line.
testimonials.name: Rachel Thompson
testimonials.title: Director of Revenue Cycle

testimonials.quote: Sarah is the rare coder who combines deep technical knowledge with excellent communication skills. She can explain complex coding concepts to providers in a way that actually improves their documentation.
testimonials.name: Dr. Maria Santos
testimonials.title: Practice Administrator

testimonials.quote: Her HCC risk adjustment work was thorough and compliant. Sarah understands the nuances of Medicare Advantage coding and consistently delivers accurate, well-supported RAF scores.
testimonials.name: Kevin Walsh
testimonials.title: VP of Compliance

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Whether you need coding expertise, audit services, or compliance consulting, I'd love to hear from you. Let's discuss how I can help optimize your revenue cycle.
